Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship brings together the nation’s top canine athletes and handlers in Shreveport-Bossier City, Louisiana. In Part 1 of the Amateur Division, teams face off in challenging Retriever Trials alongside high-energy SRS Super Dock competition. Precision, power, and teamwork are put to the test as the road to the Crown begins.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 1"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: Trenton and Rex link up with Gehrig Dieter and Anthony Sherman from the Kansas City Chiefs. While filling the boat with crappie they got to learn about the guys and their careers in the NFL.
Video.title: "Crappie Kingdom"

Video.summary: Mike heads to Table Rock Lake to meet up with Trenton and his family. Even battling the tough fishing conditions following a heavy front, there’s never a lack of family time, laughs or friendly competitions with the Southards.
Video.title: “Family Rock”

Video.summary: The Crew heads to Rivers Lodge and Hunt Club in Kansas to fish strip pits. Trenton and Rex take on Mike and Nate in a 3 period mini tournament. With multiple species allowed including northern pike, the two teams are neck and neck after the first two periods. Due to bad weather on day 2, period 3 turned into a hour speed round where only keeper largemouth count.
Video.title: "Rivers"

Video.summary: In this educational episode, we head to the Hornady headquarters in Nebraska to explore the history and evolution of popular calibers
Video.title: "Classic And Contemporary Calibers"

Video.summary: Join in as Randy and Cody are hard at work on the Raven Planting some Big Tine borderline on one of their favorite plots on the farm. Then learn all about their summer time clover plot maintenance routine.
Video.title: "Summer Time Borderline And Clover Plot Maintenance"

Image.alt: "Summer Time Borderline And Clover Plot Maintenance"
"Summer Time Borderline And Clover Plot Maintenance"
"Summer Time Borderline And Clover Plot Maintenance"

Video.summary: On this adventure, we travel to Sioux Narrows Ontario Canada for a week long trip with Time on the Water to Lake of the Woods. In this episode we share the stories of Vietnam Veteran Leon Merhkens, fire fighters Jeff Benson/Seth Beyer and founder/CEO of Time on the Water, Chris Hansen. In addition, the fishing is pretty good too! We also highlight Iowa City Scheels Hometown hero Nic Pruter.
Video.title: "Time on the Water"

Video.summary: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 1"

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: Randy is getting the last food plot of the season in down at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma. Then opening day of the 2025 bow season starts off in an unusual way for the crew. Randy smokes a Hog and Nate Has a really close call with one of the target bucks.
Video.title: "Bow Camp 2025 at The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: In this eye-opening episode, Dan Schmidt explores the fascinating science behind a whitetail deer's vision.
Video.title: S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"

Image.alt: S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"
S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"
S20:E9 "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"

Video.summary: Anatomy Hunter Brian Johnson shares his meticulous research on deer anatomy and behavior, guiding Dan through the critical factors that determine the perfect shot placement.
Video.title: "Anatomy Hunter"

Video.summary: Hosts, Mark Kayser and Daniel Schmidt show how hunters can successfully adapt their familiar eastern tactics for success in the West.
Video.title: "Western Whitetails"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared joins his best new bud, Capt. Garrett George for a summertime Mahi bash.
Video.title: "Islamorada Mahi"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take a trip to the Marathon, FL area to challenge some feisty sharks and sneaky snook.
Video.title: "Sharks And Snook Near Home"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by young guide Richard Black as he leads them to a backcountry slam.
Video.title: "Richard Black Slam"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Key West guide Nick LaBadie, a talented guide with a special knack for finding permit on the Key West flats.
Video.title: "Key West with Nick Labadie"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by New York Cop Mike Counihan, who brings his passion for fitness and fishing along as the crew take on sharks in the Middle Florida Keys flats.
Video.title: "Mike Counihan And The Sharks"

Video.summary: The Southards are heads to Table Rock for the annual family vacation. Receding water poses a challenge but there’s no lack of fish or laughs at the lake!
Video.title: "Table Rock Tradition"

Video.summary: Rex meets up with “Mr Crappie” Wally Marshall in Texas. Wally takes Rex to one of his secret spots to put the hammer on the crappie. Not only did they catch crappie, but nice largemouth and some top tier coppernose bluegill.
Video.title: "Slab Daddy"

Video.summary: With the drought ending and rain headed their way, the crew hunts the final days of the first split in Bayou Black with new friends Jesse Griffiths and Dirk Sorrells.
Video.title: "Bayou Black Belly Bands"

Video.summary: The second split is here, and the crew decides to try their luck at historic Old Hickory in Lacour, Louisiana. Ducks, deer, and mouth-watering meals are all on the menu.
Video.title: "Lacour Long Gravy"

Video.summary: Nate catches up with the Oklahoma buck that he had the close call with, and Cody is able to close the chapter with a buck he has been after for a few seasons.
Video.title: "Bow Camp 2025 at The Dirty Bird Part 2"

Image.alt: "Bow Camp 2025 at The Dirty Bird Part 2"
"Bow Camp 2025 at The Dirty Bird Part 2"
"Bow Camp 2025 at The Dirty Bird Part 2"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma trying to run some trot lines on the North Canadian river but the water is just a little lower than they expected.
Video.title: "Pirates Of The Canadian"

Video.summary: Trenton makes a trip to Louisiana to fish with Theophile Bourgeois at the Cajun Vista Lodge. With an early rain delay, they took a tour of the lodge and learned about its long standing family history before hitting the water for some redfish.
Video.title: "Cajun Vista"

Video.summary: The Amateur Division reaches its climax at the Super Retriever Series Crown Championship. Top teams battle through the final rounds of Retriever Trials, where every point matters. In the end, one standout handler and dog team rises above the rest to be crowned Amateur SRS Crown Champions. At the same time, the excitement continues on the dock as fun-loving canine athletes compete for their own Crown victories in SRS Super Dock.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 2"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Minnesota can be tough during opening week, but this season started on fire. Strutters in the decoys, hard-gobbling timber birds, fanning a solo tom … this episode has it all.
Video.title: "Minnesota Turkey Hunting: Season Kickoff"

Video.summary: It’s opening morning of turkey season in the hills of Tennessee and we’re set up on the X. Gobblers are on fire and ready to dance. When the Turkey POSSE and the Pleasure Gang get together, we have a good time!
Video.title: "Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"

Image.alt: "Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"
"Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"
"Turkey Hunting in Tennessee with the Pleasure Gang"

Video.summary: Texas turkey hunting doesn’t disappoint in this action-packed TURKEY POSSE episode. Will Cooper and his buddy Matthew Itz get it done on some fired-up Rio Grandes, with Will even doubling up on a solo mission when opportunity strikes. But the best moment comes when Matthew and Will take Matthew’s son into the field for his very first turkey hunt. From wide eyes in the blind to watching his dad bag a big tom, it’s a full-circle hunt that’s about more than just punching tags — it’s about passing it on. Rio's gobbling, close encounters, and memories that’ll last a lifetime… this one has it all.
Video.title: "Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"

Image.alt: "Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"
"Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"
"Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"

Video.summary: The National Wild Turkey Federation stands for much more than the wild turkey – it’s also about forging lifelong relationships and enjoying the kind of fellowship you can only find in turkey camp. Josh Dahlke joins NWTF Regional Director Kevin Hurst and friends to celebrate Spring in pursuit of Missouri longbeards.
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Camp with NWTF"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade does more summer food plot prep in hopes "Pope" will make an appearance! With Rain on the way Slade is able to disk and seed his "Pope" Summer spot!
Video.title: "The Plan for "POPE"!"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger meet up with Capt. Brain Wilson in Galveston, TX for a taste of what the Texas Gulf Coast has to offer.
Video.title: "Welcome to Galveston"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger join Capt. Brain Wilson in Galveston, TX for some hot Red Snapper action.
Video.title: "Red Snapper Slam"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger go north for a change to sight fish tripletails in Florida Bay.
Video.title: "Triple Tail in the Florida Bay"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger head to the hump on a windy day to target tunas and find some bonus mahis and tripletails as well.
Video.title: "Rough Day at the Hump"

Video.summary: Being consistently productive on the water means knowing how to adapt to conditions. Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger switch it up and fish shallow for sailfish.
Video.title: "Sailfish Save The Day"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger launch from the incomparable Oceans Edge Resort in Key West, Florida to hunt down all kinds of sport fish.
Video.title: "Key West Mahi and Sails"

Video.summary: Central Florida’s St. John’s River is home to countless species of wildlife, making this sweet water estuary the perfect playground for a pair of river rats, Captains Jonathan Moss and Nick Clark.
Video.title: "River Rats"

Video.summary: This week we're joined by our good friend and Worship Leader, Rob Key. A tremendous musical talent that's chased the country music dream, but found his calling as worship leader at Taylorsville Community Church. Rob's love for serving the Lord is his top priority, but he certainly enjoys the great outdoors and especially doing a little fishing.
Video.title: "Worship, Music, and Bassin'"

Video.summary: LBP Spotlights Internet Personality and YouTube Star Lawson Lindsey as he searches for trophy fish at the Headwaters of the Loxahatchee River.
Video.title: "Lawson Lindsey"

Video.summary: Every experienced turkey hunter is familiar with the magical 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. window for calling up lonely gobblers. Despite high heat and heavy winds, the Turkey POSSE strikes a pair of midday longbeards in this episode and lets the Savage Renegauge go to work.
Video.title: "Midday Magic"

Video.summary: In the heart of Texas, where turkey hunting is legendary, HuntStand Turkey POSSE member Will Cooper joins forces with friends to bring down four Rio Grande gobblers in four days. From an insane double on two longbeards, to an awesome youth hunt comeback, this episode is packed with Lone Star action.
Video.title: "Texas Turkey Throwdown"

Video.summary: The TURKEY POSSE is on a three-state turkey hunting quest in the Northeast. Josh Dahlke stops in Maine and goes after a sneaky river-bottom gobbler.
Video.title: "TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"

Image.alt: "TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"
"TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"
"TURKEY HUNTING in Maine | Silent GOBBLER Sneaks In"

Video.summary: When it comes to Merriam’s turkey hunting, the Black Hills of South Dakota delivers an authentic experience. Lots of public land, lots of white-tipped gobblers, and the rugged terrain you expect in a true Merriam’s turkey hunt.
Video.title: "Black Hills Turkey Hunt"

Video.summary: Randy and Cody are back on the Raven in Missouri and with opening day of bow season fast approaching they are scrambling to get all the final prep work done and correct any mistakes they might have made along the way.
Video.title: "Brotherly Love"

Video.summary: With bow camp starting off strong at the Dirty Bird, Randy is feeling good about the rest of the week. Until Cody decides to head into town and places a small wager with a stranger.
Video.title: "Where's The TV"

Video.summary: With two weeks until the opener of Missouri archery season, Randy and Cody are trying to do everything they can to have the Raven prepped for the first bow camp.
Video.title: "Mother Nature Always Win"

Video.summary: The boys are in Missouri at the Raven and they are ready to burn some powder and get rifle season kicked off at the Raven.
Video.title: "Rifle Camp At The Raven"

Video.summary: In this episode, we take you to historic Saint Francisville, Louisiana. We closed on a couple of real estate properties in this area and want to show you why this area is so unique from a recreational standpoint. This place holds the “old south” feel that is ever so fleeting. We hunt on a property I sold to a client last year in Saint Francisville and manage to get a beautiful longbearded turkey on the ground. This episode is one you definitely don’t want to miss.
Video.title: "Hunting Next To A Haunted House"+

Video.summary: In this episode we show you how we handle selling real estate in the midst of turkey season. When it is time to chase turkeys, our productivity as agents definitely slows a little bit, so that means we have to spend more hours ensuring our clients get what they deserve from us. We bounce around in this one going from taking the kids to school, handling business at the office, showing an amazing property, and finally getting some time to hunt. We hope this episode gives you a bit more insight on just how hectic and fast paced our Springs are at Hunting Land Man in Southwest Mississippi.
Video.title: "The Grind"
